steps.title: Center the collection moment
steps.content: The prompt asks for an opening to a narration about collecting Wulffia maculata. The useful notes are the collector, date, location, specimen, and family. Details about Senecio chapalensis, online viewing, or Torres's whole career shift the focus away from that moment.

steps.title: Reject the broader details
steps.content: Choice B compares two specimens instead of beginning the narration. Choice C also frames the point as a comparison with Senecio chapalensis. Choice D focuses on the herbarium where samples can now be viewed, not on the collection event. The remaining choice centers the collection of Wulffia maculata. The answer is A.
